items.md: # GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS (Dell)
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS (Dell)

items.md: ## Four Color 1010 - July-Sept. 1959 - 36 pages
items.value: Four Color 1010 - July-Sept. 1959 - 36 pages

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and the Flying Farm Hand - 8 - art only - Dumbo comes to Grandma's farm, at the nephews' invitation, but scares the animals until the nephews hit on using him as a scarecrow. *(Mar. 6, 1959)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and the Flying Farm Hand - 8 - art only - Dumbo comes to Grandma's farm, at the nephews' invitation, but scares the animals until the nephews hit on using him as a scarecrow. (Mar. 6, 1959)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and A Honey of a Hen - 7 - art only - Scrooge, at Grandma's farm to buy some produce, fakes an accident so that he can enjoy Grandma's cooking for a few days, but he gives himself away when he sees a hen in danger from a chicken hawk. *(Mar. 6, 1959)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and A Honey of a Hen - 7 - art only - Scrooge, at Grandma's farm to buy some produce, fakes an accident so that he can enjoy Grandma's cooking for a few days, but he gives himself away when he sees a hen in danger from a chicken hawk. (Mar. 6, 1959)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and the Weather Watchers - 7 - art only - Gyro invents a mechanical weather-vane for Grandma's farm, but Grandma's goat interferes with it, causing it to give out alarming forecasts. *(Mar. 6, 1959)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and the Weather Watchers - 7 - art only - Gyro invents a mechanical weather-vane for Grandma's farm, but Grandma's goat interferes with it, causing it to give out alarming forecasts. (Mar. 6, 1959)

items.md:
GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and the Sheepish Cowboys - 6 7/8 - art only - The nephews ride on sheep when their horse runs away, but the other sheep follow their mounts. The nephews pen up the sheep in a gully, where the Big Bad Wolf finds them. *(Mar. 6, 1959)*
The Dell Pledge fills out the last page.
items.value:
GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS and the Sheepish Cowboys - 6 7/8 - art only - The nephews ride on sheep when their horse runs away, but the other sheep follow their mounts. The nephews pen up the sheep in a gully, where the Big Bad Wolf finds them. (Mar. 6, 1959)
The Dell Pledge fills out the last page.

items.md: ## Four Color 1073 - Jan.-Mar. 1960 - 36 pages
items.value: Four Color 1073 - Jan.-Mar. 1960 - 36 pages

items.md: Front cover: Grandma cracks an egg for Gus Goose's breakfast and finds a chick inside. *(July 18, 1959)*
items.value: Front cover: Grandma cracks an egg for Gus Goose's breakfast and finds a chick inside. (July 18, 1959)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK Mopping Up - 1 (inside front cover) - art only - Grandma puts down fly paper to keep Gus from tracking up her kitchen floor. *(July 28, 1959)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK Mopping Up - 1 (inside front cover) - art only - Grandma puts down fly paper to keep Gus from tracking up her kitchen floor. (July 28, 1959)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS Touche' Toupee' - 6 - art only - After Grandma's horse eats some of his hay and apples, her neighbor Si Bumpkin accuses her of stealing his eggs. *(July 15, 1959)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS Touche' Toupee' - 6 - art only - After Grandma's horse eats some of his hay and apples, her neighbor Si Bumpkin accuses her of stealing his eggs. (July 15, 1959)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Snow Chaser - 6 - art only - Gyro uses a "snow chaser" to vaporize snow on Grandma's farm, but through a series of misadventures, the vaporized snow builds up in storm clouds overhead. *(July 28, 1959)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Snow Chaser - 6 - art only - Gyro uses a "snow chaser" to vaporize snow on Grandma's farm, but through a series of misadventures, the vaporized snow builds up in storm clouds overhead. (July 28, 1959)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS Free Ski Spree - 6 - art only - Scrooge tries winter sports at Grandma's, but has little luck at ice skating, tobogganing or skiing. *(July 15, 1959)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS Free Ski Spree - 6 - art only - Scrooge tries winter sports at Grandma's, but has little luck at ice skating, tobogganing or skiing. (July 15, 1959)

items.md: ## Four Color 1161 - Feb.-Apr. 1961 \[(January) 1961] - 36 pages
items.value: Four Color 1161 - Feb.-Apr. 1961 [(January) 1961] - 36 pages

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Whole Herd of Help - 8 - art only - Scrooge gives Grandma an elephant that he has received as a gift, and the elephant proves useful on the farm. *(Aug. 8, 1960)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Whole Herd of Help - 8 - art only - Scrooge gives Grandma an elephant that he has received as a gift, and the elephant proves useful on the farm. (Aug. 8, 1960)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Day the Farm Stood Still - 6 - Grandma wakes to find the farm silent, waiting for the return of a precocious chick who has upset all of the surrounding farmers with his efforts to help them. *(Aug. 8, 1960)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Day the Farm Stood Still - 6 - Grandma wakes to find the farm silent, waiting for the return of a precocious chick who has upset all of the surrounding farmers with his efforts to help them. (Aug. 8, 1960)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Training Farm Fuss - 7 - art only - Gladstone practices being a matador, using one of Grandma's bulls, then heads for Mexico. *(Aug. 8, 1960)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Training Farm Fuss - 7 - art only - Gladstone practices being a matador, using one of Grandma's bulls, then heads for Mexico. (Aug. 8, 1960)

items.md: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Reversed Rescue - 7 - art only - Donald flies in a helicopter to Grandma's snowbound farm, but is shot down by the Beagle Boys, and Grandma and the nephews have to rescue him. *(Aug. 8, 1960)*
items.value: GRANDMA DUCK'S FARM FRIENDS The Reversed Rescue - 7 - art only - Donald flies in a helicopter to Grandma's snowbound farm, but is shot down by the Beagle Boys, and Grandma and the nephews have to rescue him. (Aug. 8, 1960)
